_comment: Dataverse-style accreditation/action tracker for the B.B.A. AACSB reaffirmation. This is the create_entity / update_entity / fetch write target for the 'Agent with MCP / Tools' tier (the create-tracked-task hero action). Rows have stable ids; writes append or patch here at runtime (in-memory unless persisted).

accreditation_tracker.description: Close assurance-of-learning loop on written-communication rubric
Obtain program-review committee sign-off on the course-sequence change
Publish approved revised assessment plan to program SharePoint
